title: 宝塚記念の後に・2つの理想

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The crowd roars with excitement during the
Takarazuka Kinen as they watch Silence Suzuka
surge forward with the speed definitive of this
new generation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright is taken aback, but the event has
also lit a new fire beneath her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
These two racers, both determined to continue
improving, swear to race together again at the
autumn Tenno Sho.
